analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,700 as of Apr 25 08:13 UTC. Down ~0.57-1.69% on the day, up ~13.6% in April. Trading range $77K-$79K. $79K is key resistance. Monthly gain is best in ~1 year.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 (Fear zone) — declined 4pts, cautious but not extreme
BTC dominance: 58.1% (rising) — capital rotating to BTC defensively, altcoins soft
Daily volume: 15-20% below average — low conviction, compression phase
USDT supply ~$150B (near ATH) — structural liquidity support intact
KelpDAO $292M DeFi exploit: TVL -$14B, altcoins fragile, BTC unaffected
FOMC Apr 28-29: rate hold widely expected but hawkish tone risk remains
No major macro data releases scheduled today (Apr 25)
GDP Q1 advance + PCE index due Apr 30 — next key macro window
analysis.macro_backdrop: No scheduled macro releases on Apr 25. FOMC Apr 28-29 is next major event — rate hold priced in at current 3.50-3.75% target but hawkish surprise is tail risk. GDP Q1 advance + PCE due Apr 30. Oil prices elevated due to Iran/Hormuz tensions. Big Tech earnings (MSFT/Apple) Apr 29-30. CPI next release May 12.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.40): Despite strong April monthly trend (+13.6%), daily price action is softening (-0.57% to -1.69%), sentiment has dipped into Fear zone (F&G 46, -4pts), volume is below average, and FOMC in 3 days creates pre-event uncertainty. Confidence below 0.50 threshold — macro filter INACTIVE this cycle. Appropriate to let the bot trade on technical signals alone.
